base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wall_cling — a character from 1988 ninja gaiden. Wall-cling + wall-jump — signature Ninja Gaiden move. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wall-cling + wall-jump — signature Ninja Gaiden move
